text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I watch the other racers train...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eek! I-I'm so sorry! I'm in the way, aren't I? That's
right. I'm just a waste of space taking up someone
else's place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I calm Meisho Doto down and explain that wasn't
what I meant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I ask why she's staring at the track, she tells
me she wanted to watch T.M. Opera O run.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to follow her example, but I don't
think I'm anywhere near good enough to copy
her...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She runs with so much power and confidence...
She has everything I don't...
choice_data_list:
You should try copying her unwavering
confidence.
You should try copying her boundless energy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Confidence... That's the thing I lack the most.
choice_data_list: They say you should fake it till you make it.
They say you should fake it till you make it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Fake it till I make it... Do you think it'll work if I
make up a nickname for myself like Opera has?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If she's the "Centurial Overlord," maybe I can be
the "Centurial Tempest" or something.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Indeed, that is a positively superb-sounding
name!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? O-Opera O?! Did... did you hear all that?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
P-please ignore me! There's no way I could live up
to such an impressive name!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto flees from us with the force of a
raging storm. In her haste, she passes an entire
pack of training Umamusume in an instant.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Her name truly speaks for itself! Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Right. She is always radiating energy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... There's no way I can be like that... It's just
too hard...
choice_data_list: Let's get her to demonstrate for you, then!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I might be able to do it if I had a
demonstration... Um... I'll try asking her for one,
then.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-haaah... Ha ha—hack! Cough!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And now, strike a refined pose!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... A refined... pose...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ta-daaa—eek?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Goodness. What an exceptionally unique pose! It seems I have things to learn from you!
